title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, May 10 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 10/05/2022
Image reference: 2022-05-10_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-may-10-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values have firmed
Handy BC Irongate (28,100 DWT, Apr 2015, I-S) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 18.00 mil, VV Value USD 18.96 mil - BWTS Fitted. Tankers: LR1 values have firmed
Aframax FSL Hong Kong (115,000 DWT, Apr 2007, Samsung) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 19.40 mil, VV Value USD 21.04 mil - SS Due. Containers: Container values have softened
Handy Container Norderoog (1,402 TEU, Nov 2004, Jinling Shipyard Weihai) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 22 mil, VV Value USD 26.43.
